subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Quds 2
subcodes.first_line: This is the Tablet of holiness; it was sent down, from the realm of revelation, unto him who hath discovered the fragrance of the garment wafting from the direction of sanctity
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح القدس نزل من جبروت الامر لمن وجد عرف القمیص من شطر التقدیس و اقبل
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
